title: Department of Coverage Planning

frontmatter.title: Department of Coverage Planning
frontmatter.description: Coverage and RF planning — modeling propagation, selecting sites, and analyzing points of interest to maximize served population per build.

body:
# Department of Coverage Planning

Where the network *should* reach. Agents model RF propagation, evaluate coverage quality, and select
sites against population and points-of-interest density to maximize the served footprint per build.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [GROW-101](courses/grow-101.md) | Coverage & RF Planning | Intro | 3 | AGENG-201 |
| [GROW-220](courses/grow-220.md) | Site Selection & POI Analysis | Core | 4 | GROW-101 |

Part of the [School of Growth & Planning](../../index.md).
